videos.headline: Kyle McCord throws 3 pick-sixes in 5-INT horror show for Syracuse
videos.description: Syracuse QB Kyle McCord has a night to forget as he throws five interceptions, including a trio of pick-sixes, in a blowout loss to Pittsburgh.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyle McCord throws 3 pick-sixes in 5-INT horror show for Syracuse) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rasheem Biles' pick-six gives Pittsburgh early lead
videos.description: Rasheem Biles picks off a misplaced pass by Kyle McCord and returns it for a Pittsburgh touchdown early in the game vs. Syracuse.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rasheem Biles' pick-six gives Pittsburgh early lead) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Look what I found! Pitt LB has INT fall into hands while on the ground
videos.description: Pittsburgh's Brandon George makes an incredible catch while on the ground to come up with an interception vs. Syracuse.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Look what I found! Pitt LB has INT fall into hands while on the ground) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Another Pitt-six! Kyle Louis takes this one 59 yards for TD
videos.description: Kyle Louis goes 59 yards to return a Kyle McCord pass for another Pittsburgh pick-six vs. Syracuse.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Another Pitt-six! Kyle Louis takes this one 59 yards for TD) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Censere Lee spins around his defender for Pitt TD
videos.description: Censere Lee catches an Eli Holstein pass and spins his way into the end zone for a Pittsburgh touchdown vs. Syracuse.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Censere Lee spins around his defender for Pitt TD) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kyle McCord punches in rushing TD for Syracuse
videos.description: Kyle McCord runs in a Syracuse touchdown to reduce their deficit vs. Pittsburgh.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyle McCord punches in rushing TD for Syracuse) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Pittsburgh turns 5th interception into touchdown drive
videos.description: Pittsburgh's Phillip O'Brien Jr. makes the play for the interception, which Raphael Williams Jr. later cashes in for a touchdown vs. Syracuse.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pittsburgh turns 5th interception into touchdown drive) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dan Villari runs in for Syracuse TD
videos.description: Dan Villari barrels into the end zone to reduce Syracuse's deficit vs. Pittsburgh.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dan Villari runs in for Syracuse TD) 2024/10/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kyle McCord sacks himself to put bow on miserable outing
videos.description: Syracuse QB Kyle McCord ends up sacking himself on a drop-back by tripping over his own feet.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyle McCord sacks himself to put bow on miserable outing) 2024/10/24 ESHEET
